creator: brandon.kastning@protonmail.com
text:
Besides the stellar timing of auto-lock without "mouse saves" ... Xscreensaver on a FreeBSD 11 - 9-11-2016 release, fully updated with LXDE.

Using Mozilla FireFox browser with Protonmail.com Notification Add-on is leaking visible notifications even when the screensaver is locked.

I'm not sure how many people are affected by this. However I felt it necessary to report this security hole.

Best Regards,


Brandon Kastning
